PUPPET_FILE
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_find')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('docker_command')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' images | egrep '^(docker.io/)?')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' ' | awk '{ print \$2 }' | grep ^')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_tag')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('$"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_find')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('docker_command')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' images | egrep '^(docker.io/)?')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' ' | awk '{ print \$2 }' | grep ^')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_tag')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('$$"')
  PsiWhiteSpace('\n')
  PsiPuppetExpressionAssignmentImpl(EXPRESSION_ASSIGNMENT)
    Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
      PsiElement($)('$')
      PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_find')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiElement(=)('=')
    PsiWhiteSpace(' ')
    PsiPuppetQuotedTextImpl(QUOTED_TEXT)
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_START)('"')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('docker_command')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' images | egrep '^(docker.io/)?')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_MIDDLE)(' ' | awk '{ print \$2 }' | grep ^')
      Puppet: VAR_WRAPPER
        PsiElement($)('$')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE{)('{')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE_NAME)('image_tag')
        PsiElement(VARIABLE})('}')
      PsiElement(DOUBLE_QUOTED_STRING_END)('a$"')
